adapters.label: OpenCode
adapters.install_hint: Install OpenCode from https://opencode.ai/docs/cli (e.g. `npm i -g opencode-ai`) and ensure `opencode` resolves on PATH. Verify with `opencode run --help` — the similarly-named Go app some package managers ship has no `run` subcommand and will not work.
adapters.description: OpenCode runtime adapter for Coven. Drives `opencode run` in non-interactive mode; system prompts and tools are configured via the OpenCode project config (AGENTS.md / opencode.json), not via CLI flags.
